name: clarvia-aeo-scanner
description: Scan any URL for AI Engine Optimization (AEO) readiness. Returns scores, dimension breakdowns, and actionable recommendations for making APIs and services more agent-friendly.

tools.name: scan_url
tools.description: Run a full AEO scan on a URL. Returns clarvia_score (0-100), rating (A+ to F), and dimension scores.

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Quick score lookup for a URL. Uses cached results when available.

tools.name: compare_services
tools.description: Compare 2-3 services side by side with score breakdowns.

tools.name: get_leaderboard
tools.description: Get top-scored services, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: search_services
tools.description: Search the Clarvia index by name, category, or keyword.
